name: layout/masonry
description: Masonry layout — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders items top-to-bottom per column).

meta.name: Masonry
meta.description: Masonry layout — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders items top-to-bottom per column).

examples.title: Masonry gallery
examples.description: Variable-height cards laid out in a masonry pattern; falls back to CSS columns

whenToUse: Galleries of variable-height items packed into balanced columns
whenNotToUse: Items that must align in rows — use Grid

related.name: AutoGrid
related.reason: Use when items are uniform height and should align in rows

related.name: MediaMasonry
related.reason: Use the section-level masonry for full-width media galleries

intent.a11yRationale: Pure layout primitive with no semantic role; does not affect the accessibility tree.
